subcodes.first_line: If Thou art the World-illuming Sun, where are the splendors of Thy gladness? And if Thou art the Moon of Paradise, where is the radiant joy of Thy sacred mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اگر شمس جهانی اشراق انوار بهجتت کو و اگر قمر رضوانی ابتهاج ضیاء اسرار قدست
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa
